mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in industrial production signals improving real activity and operating leverage, raising expected earnings revisions and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum is followed by non-positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate above already elevated levels signals deteriorating household income and default risk, reducing equity risk appetite and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months while UNRATE is above 8.0%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations deliver positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: An effective federal funds rate pinned below 0.5% lowers discount rates and supports duration-sensitive equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when inflation is not accelerating sharply.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.5% and 3-month CPIAUCSL inflation annualized below 4.0%
failure_condition: Reject if this joint condition is followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 45% of cases or if returns are not higher than periods with FEDFUNDS above 2%.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating retail sales indicate resilient nominal consumption and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days after a strong monthly sales surprise proxy.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered RSAFS strength is followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional hit rate or if average triggered return is less than zero.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in housing starts from depressed levels signals improving credit transmission and future construction demand, lifting cyclical earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises more than 10% over 6 months while FEDFUNDS remains below 1.0%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint housing-rebound and low-rate trigger has a lower 60-day mean S&P 500 return than all other observations or a negative out-of-sample hit rate above 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth following a period of weak employment signals firm confidence and rising wage income, improving revenue expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change turns positive and UNRATE does not rise over the same 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if this joint labor-healing condition fails to outperform the unconditional 20-day S&P 500 return by at least 25 basis points on average in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices while the policy rate remains near zero signals falling real policy rates but rising inflation risk; equity multiples contract, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation exceeds 5.0% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.75%
regime_hint: inflation scare under constrained monetary policy
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the downside effect disappears after controlling for INDPRO momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Weak real GDP growth signals broad demand shortfall and lower aggregate earnings growth, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when labor slack is elevated.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth below 1.0% and UNRATE above 8.0%
regime_hint: stall-speed recovery with elevated labor slack
failure_condition: Reject if the stall-speed demand trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if its mean return is not below the unconditional mean.
